title: Ultra Realistic Portrait Beautiful Korean Woman Slumped
sourceTitle: Ultra Realistic Portrait Beautiful Korean Woman Slumped
prompt:
Ultra-realistic portrait of a beautiful Korean woman slumped forward over a wooden classroom desk, both arms folded on the surface, head resting sideways on her arms with eyes half-closed in drowsy contentment. Late afternoon golden hour in an authentic Korean classroom. Camera at desk level, shooting at a slight upward angle to frame her face intimately close.
Wearing an oversized pale grey university hoodie with a faded graphic print, half-tucked into high-waisted cream wide-leg trousers. White ankle socks, white sneakers. A single small pearl stud earring. Long dark brown hair loose — several strands fallen across her cheek and spread softly over the desk surface. An open textbook and mechanical pencil rest beside her arm.
Warm amber sunlight streaming through tall windows falls directly across her face and desk — golden rim light catching in her hair, warm glow pooling on her cheekbone. Dust motes drifting slowly in the beam. Korean classroom: wooden desks, chalk-dusted green board, Korean writing, old wall clock, stacked textbooks, worn polished flooring.
35mm analog film grain, Kodak Portra 400 — pale grey hoodie rendering with beautiful Portra desaturation, warm honey skin tones. Hyper-realistic skin texture, strand-level hair detail. Shallow depth of field, background classroom softly blurred. Mood: tender exhaustion, quiet youth, nostalgic Korean drama still frame. 2:3

Midjourney 8.1
beautiful Korean woman slumped asleep on wooden classroom desk, head resting sideways on folded arms, eyes half-closed drowsy, oversized pale grey university hoodie faded print, high-waisted cream wide-leg trousers, long dark brown hair loose strands across face and desk, single pearl stud earring, open textbook beside her, late afternoon golden hour Korean classroom, amber window light warm glow across cheek, dust motes, desk-level camera slight upward angle, intimate framing, 35mm analog film grain Kodak Portra 400, warm honey tones muted greens, shallow depth of field, nostalgic Korean drama still, cinematic hyper-realistic --ar 2:3 --v 8.1 --style raw --s 250
